extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters against the Company, by the Company, against/by the Promoter, and against the Directors. I counted 6 criminal proceedings against the Promoter, 12 statutory/regulatory actions against the Promoter and Directors (11 + 1), and 4 indirect-tax proceedings against the Company; I excluded the Company’s 1 criminal proceeding by it, the Promoter’s 2 criminal proceedings by it, and all Promoter personal tax matters from the issuer-group tax count. The quantified litigation amount against the Company and its subsidiaries is the Company’s material civil litigation of ₹1.21 million plus indirect tax of ₹52.98 million, totaling ₹54.19 million, or ₹5.419 crore; the stated contingent-liabilities figure is ₹22.16 million as of December 31, 2020, converted to ₹2.216 crore without re-summing. The company-wide top-five customer concentration is 56.65% for full fiscal year 2020, measured against total revenue from operations; the top-ten figure is only for generic API business and is therefore excluded. Litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million, converted to crore at ₹10 million per crore.
